top10_new_or_updated.description: Background Information What are Precision Digital Therapeutics (PDTx)? How are PDTx designed, evaluated, implemented, scaled, and reimbursed? top10_new_or_updated.title: Legitimizing Menstrual Health Symptoms in the Workplace
top10_new_or_updated.description: How many times have people gone to work while feeling unwell because they questioned whether their symptoms were legitimate enough? That question of legitimacy lies at the heart of many invisible health challenges in the workplace. Menstrual cycle related symptoms can be painful, disruptive, and [...]

items.title: We're welcoming 4 new SIGCHI-sponsored conferences! ACM Interactive Health is for work at the intersection of HCI and Health. IH will be in Porto, Portugal, July 5 - 8. There will be an online pre-conference event on June 1 and registration for it is free. https://ih.acm.org/
items.description: We're welcoming 4 new SIGCHI-sponsored conferences! ACM Interactive Health is for work at the intersection of HCI and Health. IH will be in Porto, Portugal, July 5 - 8. There will be an online pre-conference event on June 1 and registration for it is free. ih.acm.org/ Link ACM Interactive Health 2026 IH'26 will be held in Porto, Portugal, on July 5-8, 2026. The ACM Interactive Health Conference (IH) is a new conference that aims to be the leading venue for presenting work at the intersection of... ih.acm.org

items.title: Join our virtual Town Hall Preview on Mar 23, 7pm UTC!: https://sigchi.org/events/sigchi-town-hall-preview/. Given how much is in flux around us this year, this will be a space for members to raise concerns ahead of our annual town hall at CHI. We'll also get your input on initiatives we've been working on.
items.description: Join our virtual Town Hall Preview on Mar 23, 7pm UTC!: sigchi.org/events/sigchi-tow… . Given how much is in flux around us this year, this will be a space for members to raise concerns ahead of our annual town hall at CHI. We'll also get your input on initiatives we've been working on. Link SIGCHI Town Hall Preview ACM SIGCHI is the leading international community of students and professionals interested in research, education, and practical applications of Human Computer Interaction. sigchi.org

items.title: Following our Jan 2026 town hall to share feedback on the Digital Library (DL) with ACM, we invite members to read this CACM article on the evolution of the DL: https://cacm.acm.org/opinion/evolving-the-acm-digital-library/. The article lays out the rationale for changes, and further iteration that is underway.
items.description: Following our Jan 2026 town hall to share feedback on the Digital Library (DL) with ACM, we invite members to read this CACM article on the evolution of the DL: cacm.acm.org/opinion/evolvin… . The article lays out the rationale for changes, and further iteration that is underway.
